body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35359", "cvss": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "A Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) vulnerability in the cp utility of uutils coreutils allows an attacker to bypass no-dereference intent. The utility checks if a source path is a symbolic link using path-based metadata but subsequently opens it without the O_NOFOLLOW flag. An attacker with concurrent write access can swap a regular file for a symbolic link during this window, causing a privileged cp process to copy the contents of arbitrary sensitive files into a destination controlled by the attacker.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00105, "percentile": 0.01318}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hpfw-mqm3-33jh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:14:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hpfw-mqm3-33jh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hpfw-mqm3-33jh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35359"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35359", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10017", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hpfw-mqm3-33jh"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils has a Link Following issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-30T17:14:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hpfw-mqm3-33jh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
